details: The scheme “Paalna Ghar (Crèche)” is implemented by the Women Welfare Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide day care facilities for children aged 6 months to 6 years of working couples.
benefits: Under the scheme, a crèche is run for the children of working couples, providing day care facilities for children in the age group of 6 months to 6 years.
The following fees are applicable under the scheme:
For BPL families: ₹20/- per child per month
For families with an income less than ₹12,000/-: ₹100/- per child per month
For families with an income above ₹12,000/-: ₹200/- per child per month
eligibility: The beneficiary must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
The beneficiary must be a child aged between 6 months and 6 years.

offline: A crèche is established in every district of Uttarakhand. Working couples can avail of the benefits by paying the applicable fee.

documents_required: Proof of age of the child
Income proof of the child’s parents/guardians
Any other documents as may be required

faqs.question: Who is eligible to benefit from this scheme?
faqs.answer: Working couples with children aged 6 months to 6 years are eligible.

faqs.question: Is the scheme available for all children?
faqs.answer: No, children between 6 months and 6 years of age can avail the facility.

faqs.question: Where are the crèches located?
faqs.answer: Crèches are established in every district of Uttarakhand.

faqs.question: What facilities are provided under the scheme?
What is the monthly fee for BPL families?
faqs.answer: BPL families are required to pay ₹20 per child per month.

faqs.question: What is the monthly fee for families with income less than ₹12,000?
faqs.answer: Families with income less than ₹12,000 per month need to pay ₹100 per child per month.

faqs.question: What is the monthly fee for families with income above ₹12,000?
faqs.answer: Families with income above ₹12,000 per month need to pay ₹200 per child per month.

faqs.question: How can working couples apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: They can approach the nearest crèche in their district and submit the required documents along with the applicable fee.
